title: Kazakh Soviet Socialist Republic is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Kazakh Soviet Socialist Republic, also known as Soviet Kazakhstan, the Kazakh SSR, KSSR, or simply Kazakhstan, was one of the constituent republics of the Soviet Union (USSR) from 1936 to 1991.

title: German South-West Africa is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: German South West Africa was a colony of the German Empire from 1884 until 1915, when it was captured by the Western Allies during World War I.

title: Upper Canada is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: The Province of Upper Canada was a part of British Canada established in 1791 by the Kingdom of Great Britain, to govern the central third of the lands in British North America, formerly part of the Province of Quebec since 1763.

title: Province of Canada is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: The Province of Canada was a British colony in British North America from 1841 to 1867.

title: Alba Longa is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Alba Longa was an ancient Latin city in Central Italy in the vicinity of Lake Albano in the Alban Hills.

title: Province of Massachusetts Bay is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: The Province of Massachusetts Bay was a colony in New England which became one of the thirteen original states of the United States.

title: Van Diemen's Land is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: Van Diemen's Land was the colonial name of the island of Tasmania during the European exploration and colonisation of Australia in the 19th century.

title: Qara Qoyunlu is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Qara Qoyunlu or Kara Koyunlu, also known as the Black Sheep Turkomans, were a Turkoman Muslim monarchy with an extensive Persianate culture, that ruled over the territory comprising present-day Azerbaijan, Armenia, northwestern Iran, eastern Turkey, and northeastern Iraq from about 1374 to 1468.

title: Austrasia is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Austrasia was a historical region and the northeastern realm within the core of the Frankish State during the Early Middle Ages, centering on the regions between Meuse, Moselle, Middle Rhine and the Main rivers.

title: Margraviate of Brandenburg is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Margraviate of Brandenburg was a major principality of the Holy Roman Empire from 1157 to 1806.

title: Volga Bulgaria is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Volga Bulgaria or Volga–Kama Bulgaria was a historical Bulgar state that existed between the 9th and 13th centuries around the confluence of the Volga and Kama River, in what is now European Russia.

title: Archduchy of Austria is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Archduchy of Austria was a major principality and later transformed into one of the most important states of the Holy Roman Empire and the nucleus of the Habsburg monarchy.

title: Württemberg is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Württemberg is a historical German territory roughly corresponding to the cultural and linguistic region of Swabia.

title: County of Flanders is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The County of Flanders was one of the most powerful political entities in the medieval Low Countries, located on the North Sea coast of modern-day Belgium and north-eastern France.

title: House of Thani begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The House of Thani is the ruling family of Qatar, with origins tracing back to the Adnanite Banu Tamim tribe.

title: Kingdom of Cyprus is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Kingdom of Cyprus was a medieval kingdom of the Crusader states that existed between 1192 and 1489.

title: Ghaznavids begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Ghaznavid Empire was a culturally Persianate, Sunni Muslim state of Turkic mamluk origin.

title: State of Slovenes, Croats and Serbs is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The State of Slovenes, Croats and Serbs was a political entity that was constituted in October 1918, at the end of World War I, by Slovenes, Croats and Serbs (Prečani) residing in what were the southernmost parts of the Austro-Hungarian Empire.

title: French India is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: French India, formally the Établissements français dans l'Inde, was a French colony comprising five geographically separated enclaves on the Indian subcontinent that had initially been factories of the French East India Company.

title: Electoral Palatinate is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Electoral Palatinate was a constituent state of the Holy Roman Empire until it was annexed by the Electorate of Baden in 1803.

title: Bagrationi dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Bagrationi dynasty is a royal dynasty which reigned in Georgia from the Middle Ages until the early 19th century, being among the oldest extant Christian ruling dynasties in the world.

title: Himyarite kingdom is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Himyar was a polity in the southern highlands of Yemen, as well as the name of the region which it claimed.

title: British West Indies is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: The British West Indies (BWI) were the territories in the West Indies under British rule, including Anguilla, the Cayman Islands, the Turks and Caicos Islands, Montserrat, the British Virgin Islands, Bermuda, Antigua and Barbuda, the Bahamas, Barbados, Dominica, Grenada, Jamaica, Saint Kitts and Nevis, Saint Lucia, Saint Vincent and the Grenadines, British Honduras, British Guiana and Trinidad and Tobago.

title: Qara Khitai is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Qara Khitai, or Kara Khitai, also known as the Western Liao, officially the Great Liao, was a dynastic regime based in Central Asia ruled by the Yelü clan of the Khitan people.

title: Azerbaijan Soviet Socialist Republic is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Azerbaijan Soviet Socialist Republic, also referred to as the Azerbaijani Soviet Socialist Republic, Azerbaijan SSR, Azerbaijani SSR, AzSSR, Soviet Azerbaijan or simply Azerbaijan, was one of the constituent republics of the Soviet Union between 1922 and 1991.

title: Empire of Nicaea is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Empire of Nicaea, also known as the Nicene Empire, was the largest of the three Greek rump states founded by the aristocracy of the Byzantine Empire that fled when Constantinople was occupied by Western European and Venetian armed forces during the Fourth Crusade, a military event known as the Sack of Constantinople.

title: Kingdom of Iberia is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: In Greco-Roman geography, Iberia was an exonym for the Georgian kingdom of Kartli, known after its core province.

title: Tanganyika is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Tanganyika was a sovereign state, comprising the mainland part of present-day Tanzania, that existed from 1961 until 1964.

title: Gallic Empire is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Gallic Empire or Gallic Roman Empire are names used in modern historiography for a breakaway Western European part of the Roman Empire that functioned de facto as a separate state from 260 to 274.

title: Kingdom of Lombardy–Venetia is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Kingdom of Lombardy–Venetia, commonly called the "Lombardo-Venetian Kingdom", was a constituent land of the Austrian Empire from 1815 to 1866.

title: House of Al Sabah begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The House of Al-Sabah is the ruling family of Kuwait.

title: Federal Republic of Yugoslavia is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The State Union of Serbia and Montenegro, known until 2003 as the Federal Republic of Yugoslavia (FRY) and commonly referred to as Yugoslavia, was a country in Southeast Europe located in the Balkans that existed from 1992 to 2006, following the breakup of the Socialist Federal Republic of Yugoslavia.

title: Grand Duchy of Baden is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Grand Duchy of Baden was a German polity on the east bank of the Rhine.

title: Qin falls
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Qin was an ancient Chinese state during the Zhou dynasty.

title: Malacca sultanate is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Malacca Sultanate was a Malay sultanate based in the modern-day state of Malacca, Malaysia.

title: Khanate of Khiva is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Khanate of Khiva was an Uzbek monarchy that existed in the historical region of Khorezm from 1511 to 1920, except for a period of Afsharid occupation by Nader Shah between 1740 and 1746.

title: First Republic of Armenia is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The First Republic of Armenia, officially known at the time of its existence as the Republic of Armenia, or the Democratic Republic of Armenia was an independent Armenian state that existed from May 1918 to 2 December 1920 in the Armenian-populated territories of the former Russian Empire known as Eastern or Russian Armenia.

title: Electorate of Saxony is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Electorate of Saxony, also known as Electoral Saxony, was an electorate of the Holy Roman Empire, ruled by the Prince-Electors of Saxony from 1356 to 1806.

title: Principality of Antioch is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Principality of Antioch was one of the Crusader states created during the First Crusade which included parts of Anatolia and Syria.

title: Armenian Soviet Socialist Republic is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Armenian Soviet Socialist Republic (ArSSR), also known as the Armenian SSR, Soviet Armenia, or simply Armenia, was one of the constituent republics of the Soviet Union, located in the Caucasus region of Eurasia.

title: Nineteenth Dynasty of Egypt begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Nineteenth Dynasty of Egypt, also known as the Ramessid dynasty, is classified as the second Dynasty of the Ancient Egyptian New Kingdom period, lasting from 1292 BC to 1189 BC.

title: Federation of Rhodesia and Nyasaland is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Federation of Rhodesia and Nyasaland, also known as the Central African Federation (CAF), was a colonial federation that consisted of three southern African territories: the self-governing British colony of Southern Rhodesia and the British protectorates of Northern Rhodesia and Nyasaland.

title: First Republic of Austria falls
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The First Austrian Republic, officially the Republic of Austria, was created after the signing of the Treaty of Saint-Germain-en-Laye on 10 September 1919—the settlement after the end of World War I which ended the Habsburg rump state of Republic of German-Austria—and ended with the establishment of the authoritarian Federal State of Austria based upon a dictatorship of Engelbert Dollfuss and the Fatherland Front in 1934.

title: Grand Principality of Vladimir is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Grand Principality of Vladimir, before 1157 the Principality of Suzdal, and commonly known as Vladimir-Suzdal, or simply Suzdalia and Vladimiria, was a medieval principality that was established during the disintegration of Kievan Rus'.

title: Duchy of Milan is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Duchy of Milan was a state in Northern Italy, created in 1395 by Gian Galeazzo Visconti, then the lord of Milan, and a member of the important Visconti family, which had been ruling the city since 1277.

title: Kenya Colony is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: The Colony and Protectorate of Kenya, commonly known as British Kenya or British East Africa, was a colony part of the British Empire located in East Africa from 1920 until 1963.

title: Ebla is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Ebla was one of the earliest kingdoms in Syria.

title: Croatian Republic of Herzeg-Bosnia is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Croatian Republic of Herzeg-Bosnia was an unrecognized geopolitical entity and quasi-state in Bosnia and Herzegovina.

title: Spanish Sahara is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Spanish Sahara, officially the Spanish Possessions in the Sahara from 1884 to 1958, then Province of the Sahara between 1958 and 1976, was the name used for the modern territory of Western Sahara when it was occupied and ruled by Spain between 1884 and 1976.

title: Seljuk dynasty is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Seljuk dynasty, or Seljukids alternatively spelled as Saljuqids or Seljuk Turks, was an Oghuz Turkic, Sunni Muslim dynasty that culturally became Persianate and contributed to Turco-Persian culture.

title: United Provinces of the Río de la Plata is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The United Provinces of the Río de la Plata or United Provinces of the River Plate, along with United Provinces in South America, are names used to refer to the emerging state that succeeded the Viceroyalty of the Río de la Plata after the May Revolution, from 1810 to 1831, encompassing the Argentine War of Independence, the Cisplatine War and the beginning of the Argentine Civil Wars.

title: Kingdom of Poland is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Kingdom of Poland, also known informally as the Regency Kingdom of Poland, was a short-lived puppet state of the German Empire and polity that was proclaimed during World War I by it and Austria-Hungary on 5 November 1916 on the territories of formerly Russian-ruled Congress Poland held by the Central Powers as the Government General of Warsaw and which became active on 14 January 1917.

title: Kingdom of Libya is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Kingdom of Libya, known as the United Kingdom of Libya from 1951 to 1963, was a constitutional monarchy in North Africa that came into existence upon independence on 24 December 1951 from the United Kingdom and France and lasted until a bloodless coup d'état on 1 September 1969.

title: Far Eastern Republic is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Far Eastern Republic, sometimes called the Chita Republic, was a nominally independent state that existed from April 1920 to November 1922 in the easternmost part of the Russian Far East and Transbaikal.

title: Shanghai French Concession is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: The Shanghai French Concession was a foreign concession in Shanghai, China from 1849 until 1943.

title: Chu is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Chu was an ancient Chinese state during the Zhou dynasty.

title: Province of Pennsylvania is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: The Province of Pennsylvania, also known as the Pennsylvania Colony, was a British colony situated on the Mid-Atlantic seaboard of North America.

title: British Honduras is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: British Honduras was a Crown colony on the east coast of Central America — specifically located on the southern edge of the Yucatán Peninsula from 1783 to 1964, then a self-governing colony — renamed Belize from June 1973 until September 1981, when it gained full independence as Belize.

title: Northern and Southern dynasties is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Northern and Southern dynasties was a period of political division in the history of China that lasted from 420 to 589 AD, following the tumultuous era of the Sixteen Kingdoms and the Eastern Jin dynasty.

title: House of Hohenstaufen begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Hohenstaufen dynasty, also known as the Staufer, was a noble family of German origin that rose to rule the Duchy of Swabia from 1079, and to royal rule in the Holy Roman Empire during the Middle Ages from 1138 until 1254.

title: Italian Somaliland is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: Italian Somaliland comprised self-ruling protectorates and colonial possessions of the Kingdom of Italy in present-day Somalia.

title: Kingdom of Montenegro is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Kingdom of Montenegro was a monarchy in southeastern Europe, present-day Montenegro, during the tumultuous period of time on the Balkan Peninsula leading up to and during World War I.

title: Rashtrakuta dynasty falls
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Rashtrakuta Empire was a royal Indian polity ruling large parts of the Indian subcontinent between the 6th and 10th centuries.

title: West Indies Federation falls
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The West Indies Federation, also known as the West Indies, the Federation of the West Indies or the West Indian Federation, was a short-lived political union that existed from 3 January 1958 to 31 May 1962.

title: Helvetic Republic is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Helvetic Republic was a sister republic of France that existed between 1798 and 1803, during the French Revolutionary Wars.

title: Zengid dynasty is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Zengid dynasty was a Turkoman Sunni Muslim dynasty in the Middle East.

title: Mamluk Sultanate begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Mamluk dynasty, or the Mamluk Sultanate, is the historiographical name or umbrella term used to refer to the three dynasties of Mamluk origin who ruled the Ghurid territories in India and subsequently, the Sultanate of Delhi, from 1206 to 1290 — the Qutbi dynasty (1206–1211), the first Ilbari or Shamsi dynasty (1211–1266) and the second Ilbari dynasty (1266–1290).

title: Shah dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: Shah dynasty, also known as the Shahs of Gorkha or the Royal House of Gorkha, was the ruling Chaubise Thakuri dynasty and the founder of the Gorkha Kingdom from 1559 to 1768 and later the unified Kingdom of Nepal from 1768 to 28 May 2008.

title: Belgian Empire is established
subtitle: Colonial empire
fact: Belgium controlled several territories and concessions during the colonial era, principally the Belgian Congo from 1908 to 1960, Ruanda-Urundi from 1922 to 1962, and Lado Enclave from 1894 to 1910.

title: Austrian Netherlands is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Austrian Netherlands were the territory of the Burgundian Circle of the Holy Roman Empire between 1714 and 1797.

title: British Somaliland is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: British Somaliland, officially the Somaliland Protectorate, was a protectorate of the United Kingdom in the territory of modern Somaliland.

title: Kingdom of Holland is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Kingdom of Holland was the successor state of the Batavian Republic.

title: Colonial Brazil is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: Colonial Brazil, sometimes referred to as Portuguese America, comprises the period from 1500, with the arrival of the Portuguese, until 1815, when Brazil was elevated to a kingdom in union with Portugal.

title: Twenty-fifth Dynasty of Egypt begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Twenty-fifth Dynasty of Egypt, also known as the Nubian Dynasty, the Kushite Empire, the Black Pharaohs, or the Napatans, after their capital Napata, was the last dynasty of the Third Intermediate Period of Egypt that occurred after the Kushite invasion.

title: Province of New York is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: The Province of New York was a British proprietary colony and later a royal colony on the northeast coast of North America from 1664 to 1783.

title: French Equatorial Africa is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: French Equatorial Africa was a federation of French colonial territories in Equatorial Africa which consisted of Gabon, French Congo, Ubangi-Shari, and Chad.

title: Arezzo is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Arezzo is a city and comune in Italy and the capital of the province of the same name located in Tuscany.

title: Kingdom of Bosnia is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Kingdom of Bosnia, or Bosnian Kingdom, was a medieval kingdom that lasted for nearly a century, from 1377 to 1463, and evolved out of the Banate of Bosnia, which itself lasted from at least 1154.

title: Georgian Soviet Socialist Republic is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Georgian Soviet Socialist Republic, also known as Soviet Georgia, the Georgian SSR, or simply Georgia, was one of the republics of the Soviet Union from its second occupation in 1921 to its independence in 1991.

title: French Consulate is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Consulate was the top-level government of the First French Republic from the fall of the Directory in the coup of 18 Brumaire on 9 November 1799 until the start of the French Empire on 18 May 1804.

title: Duchy of Prussia is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Duchy of Prussia or Ducal Prussia was a duchy in the region of Prussia established as a result of secularization of the Monastic Prussia, the territory that remained under the control of the State of the Teutonic Order until the Protestant Reformation in 1525.

title: Gojoseon is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Old Chosŏn, also known as Gojoseon and its contemporary name Joseon, was the first kingdom on the Korean Peninsula.

title: Eastern Wu is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Wu, known in historiography as Eastern Wu or Sun Wu, was a dynastic state of China and one of the three major states that competed for supremacy over China during the Three Kingdoms period.

title: Democratic Republic of Georgia is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Democratic Republic of Georgia was the first modern establishment of a republic of Georgia, which existed from May 1918 to March 1921.

title: Lodi dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Lodi dynasty was an Afghan royal family that ruled the Sultanate of Delhi from 1451 to 1526.

title: Colony of Natal is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: The Colony of Natal was a British colony in south-eastern Africa.

title: Chinese Soviet Republic is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Chinese Soviet Republic (CSR) was a state within the Republic of China, proclaimed on 7 November 1931 by Chinese Communist Party (CCP) leaders Mao Zedong and Zhu De in the early stages of the Chinese Civil War.

title: First Spanish Republic is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Spanish Republic, historiographically referred to as the First Spanish Republic, was the political regime that existed in Spain from 11 February 1873 to 29 December 1874.

title: Electorate of Bavaria is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Electorate of Bavaria was a quasi-independent hereditary electorate of the Holy Roman Empire from 1623 to 1806, when it was succeeded by the Kingdom of Bavaria.

title: Portuguese Mozambique is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: Portuguese Mozambique or Portuguese East Africa were the common terms by which Mozambique was designated during the period in which it was a Portuguese overseas province.

title: Bosporan Kingdom is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Bosporan Kingdom, also known as the Kingdom of the Cimmerian Bosporus, was an ancient Greco-Scythian state located in eastern Crimea and the Taman Peninsula on the shores of the Cimmerian Bosporus, centered in the present-day Strait of Kerch.

title: Siberian Khanate is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Khanate of Sibir was a Siberian Tatar state in western Siberia.

title: Transcaucasian Socialist Federative Soviet Republic is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Transcaucasian Socialist Federative Soviet Republic, also known as the Transcaucasian Soviet Federative Socialist Republic, or simply Transcaucasia, was a republic of the Soviet Union that existed from 1922 to 1936.

title: Kamerun is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Kamerun was an African protectorate of the German Empire from 1884 to 1916 in the region of today's Republic of Cameroon.

title: Duchy of Brabant is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Duchy of Brabant, a state of the Holy Roman Empire, was established in 1183.

title: Kingdom of Galicia is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Kingdom of Galicia was a political entity located in southwestern Europe, which, at its territorial zenith, occupied the entire northwest of the Iberian Peninsula.

title: French Sudan is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: French Sudan was a French colonial territory in the Federation of French West Africa from around 1880 until 1959, when it joined the Mali Federation, and then in 1960, when it became the independent state of Mali.

title: Caliphate of Córdoba is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Emirate of Córdoba, and from 929, the Caliphate of Córdoba, was an Arab Islamic state ruled by the Umayyad dynasty from 756 to 1031.

title: County of Edessa is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The County of Edessa was a 12th-century Crusader state in Upper Mesopotamia.

title: French Canada is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: Canada was a French colony within New France.

title: Seuna Dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Seuna, Sevuna, or Yadavas of Devagiri was a medieval Indian dynasty, which at its peak ruled a realm stretching from the Narmada river in the north to the Tungabhadra river in the south, in the western part of the Deccan region.

title: Argead dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Argead dynasty, also known as the Temenid dynasty was an ancient Macedonian royal house of Dorian Greek provenance.

title: Middle Francia is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Middle Francia was a short-lived Frankish kingdom which was created in 843 by the Treaty of Verdun after an intermittent dynastic war between the grandsons of Charlemagne resulted in division of the united Carolingian Empire.

title: League of Corinth is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The League of Corinth, also referred to as the Hellenic League, was a federation of Greek states created by Philip II in 338–337 BC.

title: Kakatiya dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Kakatiya dynasty was a Telugu dynasty that ruled most of eastern Deccan region in present-day India between 12th and 14th centuries.

title: Fourth Dynasty of Egypt begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Fourth Dynasty of ancient Egypt is characterized as a "golden age" of the Old Kingdom of Egypt.

title: French Cochinchina is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: French Cochinchina was a colony of French Indochina from 1862 to 1949, encompassing the Mekong Delta and adjacent provinces in what is now the southern region of Vietnam, with its administrative capital in Saigon.

title: Captaincy General of the Philippines is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: The Captaincy General of the Philippines was an administrative district of the Spanish Empire in Southeast Asia governed by a governor-general as a dependency of the Viceroyalty of New Spain based in Mexico City until Mexican independence when it was transferred directly to Madrid.

title: Shu Han is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Han (漢; 221–263 AD), known in historiography as Shu Han (蜀漢 ) or Ji Han (季漢 "Junior Han"), or often shortened to Shu (Chinese: 蜀; pinyin: Shǔ; Sichuanese Pinyin: Su2 < Middle Chinese: *źjowk < Eastern Han Chinese: *dźok), was a dynastic state of China and one of the three major states that competed for supremacy over China in the Three Kingdoms period.

title: Transcaucasian Democratic Federative Republic is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Transcaucasian Democratic Federative Republic was a short-lived state in the Caucasus that included most of the territory of the present-day Armenia, Azerbaijan and Georgia, as well as parts of Russia and Turkey.

title: Portuguese Angola is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: In southwestern Africa, Portuguese Angola was a historical colony of the Portuguese Empire (1575–1951), the overseas province Portuguese West Africa of Estado Novo Portugal (1951–1972), and the State of Angola of the Portuguese Empire (1972–1975).

title: Saxe-Coburg and Gotha is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Saxe-Coburg and Gotha, or Saxe-Coburg-Gotha, was an Ernestine duchy in Thuringia ruled by a branch of the House of Wettin, consisting of territories in the present-day states of Thuringia and Bavaria in Germany.

title: Khanate of Qazan is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Khanate of Kazan was a Tatar state that encompassed the territory of the former Volga Bulgaria from 1438 until 1552.

title: Ruanda-Urundi is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Ruanda-Urundi, later Rwanda-Burundi, was a mandate and later trust territory ruled by Belgium between 1916 and 1962.

title: Estonian Soviet Socialist Republic is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Estonian Soviet Socialist Republic, also known as Soviet Estonia, was a de facto administrative subunit of the former Soviet Union, covering the occupied and annexed territory of Estonia in 1940–1941 and 1944–1991.

title: Uzbek Soviet Socialist Republic is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Uzbek Soviet Socialist Republic (UzSSR), also known as Soviet Uzbekistan, the Uzbek SSR, or simply Uzbekistan and rarely Uzbekia, was a union republic of the Soviet Union.

title: Liu Song dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: Song, known as Liu Song, Former Song (前宋) or Song of (the) Southern dynasties (南朝宋) in historiography, was an imperial dynasty of China and the first of the four Southern dynasties during the Northern and Southern dynasties period.

title: Spanish House of Bourbon begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The House of Bourbon-Anjou, generally known as the House of Bourbon, is the reigning house of the Kingdom of Spain.

title: Saadi dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Saadi Sultanate, also known as the Sharifian Sultanate, was a state which ruled present-day Morocco and parts of Northwest Africa in the 16th and 17th centuries.

title: Kingdom of Mutapa is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Mutapa Empire – also referred to as Mwenemutapa or Munhumutapa, – was an African empire in Zimbabwe, which expanded to what is now modern-day Mozambique, Botswana, Malawi, and Zambia.

title: Muslim Sicily is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The island of Sicily was under Islamic rule from the late ninth to the late eleventh centuries.

title: Italian Eritrea is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: Italian Eritrea was a colony of the Kingdom of Italy in the territory of present-day Eritrea.

title: Sabaeans is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Sheba, or Saba, was an ancient South Arabian kingdom that existed in Yemen before 275 CE.

title: Old Great Bulgaria falls
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Old Great Bulgaria, also often known by the Latin names Magna Bulgaria and Patria Onoguria, was a 7th-century Turkic nomadic empire formed by the Onogur-Bulgars on the western Pontic–Caspian steppe.

title: Kingdom of Westphalia is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Kingdom of Westphalia was a client state of France in present-day Germany that existed from 1807 to 1813.

title: Kingdom of Kent is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Kingdom of the Kentish, today referred to as the Kingdom of Kent, was an early medieval English kingdom in present-day South East England.

title: Dutch Formosa is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: The island of Taiwan, also commonly known as Formosa, was partly under colonial rule by the Dutch Republic from 1624 to 1662.

title: Belarusian People's Republic is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Belarusian People's Republic, also known as the Belarusian Democratic Republic, was a state proclaimed by the Council of the Belarusian Democratic Republic in its Second Constituent Charter on 9 March 1918 during World War I.

title: Bahmani Sultanate is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Bahmani Kingdom, or the Bahmani Sultanate, was a late medieval Persianate kingdom that ruled the Deccan region.

title: Duchy of Lorraine is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Duchy of Lorraine, initially also known as the Duchy of Upper Lorraine, was a duchy of the Holy Roman Empire which existed from the 10th century until 1766, when it was annexed by the Kingdom of France.

title: Persian Empire is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Achaemenid Empire was an ancient Iranian empire founded by Cyrus the Great of the Achaemenid dynasty in 550 BC.

title: Hafsid dynasty is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Hafsid dynasty was a Sunni Muslim dynasty of Berber descent that ruled Ifriqiya from 1229 to 1574.

title: Nanyue is established
subtitle: Historical state

subtitle: Historical state
fact: The County of Tripoli (1102–1289) was one of the Crusader states.

subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The House of Ascania is an Old Saxon high noble family historically documented since the 11th century.

title: Gilbert and Ellice Islands is established
subtitle: Colony

title: Meroë is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Meroë was an ancient city on the east bank of the Nile about 6 km north-east of the Kabushiya station near Shendi, Sudan, approximately 200 km north-east of Khartoum.

title: Nasrid dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Nasrid dynasty was an Arab dynasty that ruled the Emirate of Granada from 1232 to 1492.

title: Principality of Serbia falls

fact: Spanish Formosa was a small colony of the Spanish Empire established in the northern tip of the island now known as Taiwan, then known to Europeans at the time as Formosa or to Spaniards as "Isla Hermosa" from 1626 to 1642.

title: Eleventh Dynasty of Egypt begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The 11th Dynasty of ancient Egypt is a well-attested group of rulers.

title: Aghlabids is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Aghlabid dynasty was an Arab dynasty that ruled Ifriqiya from 800 to 909, nominally as vassals of the Abbasid Caliphate.

title: Dutch Gold Coast is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: The Dutch Gold Coast or Dutch Guinea, officially Dutch possessions on the Coast of Guinea, was a portion of contemporary Ghana that was gradually colonized by the Dutch, beginning in 1612.

title: Declaration of Independence of the Democratic Republic of Vietnam is proclaimed
subtitle: Declaration of independence
fact: The declaration of independence of the Democratic Republic of Vietnam was written by Hồ Chí Minh and announced in public at the Ba Đình square in Hanoi on 2 September 1945.

title: Western Ganga dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: Western Ganga was an important ruling dynasty of ancient Karnataka in India which lasted from about 350 to 999 CE.

title: Twenty-first Dynasty of Egypt begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Twenty-first Dynasty of Egypt is usually classified as the first Dynasty of the Ancient Egyptian Third Intermediate Period, lasting from 1077 BC to 943 BC.

title: Free City of Kraków is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Free City of Cracow, also known as the Republic of Cracow, and officially the Free, Independent, and Strictly Neutral City of Cracow and its District, was a nominally independent city-state that existed from 1815 to 1846.

title: Seventeenth Dynasty of Egypt begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Seventeenth Dynasty of Egypt was a dynasty of pharaohs that ruled in Upper Egypt during the late Second Intermediate Period, approximately from 1580 to 1550 BC.

title: Portuguese Cape Verde is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: Cape Verde was a colony of the Portuguese Empire from the initial settlement of the Cape Verde Islands in 1462 until the independence of Cape Verde in 1975.

title: French Dahomey is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: French Dahomey, officially the Colony of Dahomey and Dependencies, was a French colony and part of French West Africa from 1894 to 1958.

title: Antarctic France is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: France Antarctique was a French colony in Rio de Janeiro, in modern-day Brazil, which existed between 1555 and 1567, and had control over the coast from Rio de Janeiro to Cabo Frio.

title: French Upper Volta is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: Upper Volta was a colony of French West Africa established in 1919 in the territory occupied by present-day Burkina Faso.

title: British Togoland is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: British Togoland, officially the Mandate Territory of Togoland and later officially the Trust Territory of Togoland, was a territory in West Africa under the administration of the United Kingdom, which subsequently entered a union with Ghana, part of which became its Volta Region.

title: Ly dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Lý dynasty, officially Đại Cồ Việt from 1009 to 1054 and Đại Việt from 1054 to 1225, was a Vietnamese dynasty that existed from 1009 to 1225.

title: Khorezm People's Soviet Republic is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Khorezm People's Soviet Republic was the state created as the successor to the Khanate of Khiva in February 1920, when the Khan abdicated in response to pressure.

title: Tulunids begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Tulunid State, also known as the Tulunid Emirate or the State of Banu Tulun, and popularly referred to as the Tulunids was a Mamluk dynasty of Turkic origin who ruled Egypt on behalf of the Abbasid Caliphate.

title: Sajids begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Sajid dynasty was a Muslim dynasty, of Iranian origin, that ruled from 889/890 until 929.

title: Artuqids begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Artuqid dynasty was established in 1102 as a Turkish principality of the Seljuk Empire.

title: Pyu city-states is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Pyu city-states were a group of city-states that existed from about the 2nd century BCE to the mid-11th century in present-day Upper Myanmar.

title: Thirtieth Dynasty of Egypt begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Thirtieth Dynasty of Egypt is usually classified as the fifth Dynasty of the Late Period of ancient Egypt.

title: Giray dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The House of Giray, also the Girays, were a Genghisid Turkic dynasty that reigned in the Khanate of Crimea from its formation in 1431 until its downfall in 1783.

title: Offenburg is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: Offenburg is a city in the state of Baden-Württemberg, in south-western Germany.

title: Anushtegin dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Anushtegin dynasty or Anushteginids, also known as the Khwarazmian dynasty was a Sunni Muslim dynasty of Turkic mamluk origin from the Bekdili clan of the Oghuz Turks.

title: Rustamid dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Rustamid dynasty was an Ibadi dynasty of Persian origin which ruled a state that was centered in present-day Algeria.

title: Finnish Declaration of Independence is proclaimed
subtitle: Declaration of independence
fact: The Finnish Declaration of Independence was adopted by the Parliament of Finland on 6 December 1917.

title: Act of Abjuration is proclaimed
subtitle: Declaration of independence
fact: The Act of Abjuration is the declaration of independence by many of the provinces of the Netherlands from their allegiance to Philip II of Spain, during the Dutch Revolt.

title: Bulgarian Declaration of Independence is proclaimed
subtitle: Declaration of independence
fact: The de jure independence of Bulgaria from the Ottoman Empire was proclaimed on 5 October [O.S.

title: Shaddadids begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Shaddadids were a Sunni Muslim dynasty of Kurdish origin. who ruled in various parts of Armenia and Arran from 951 to 1199 AD.

title: Rasulid dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Rasulid dynasty or Rasulids were a Sunni Yemeni dynasty who ruled Yemen from 1229 to 1454.

title: Act of Independence of Lithuania is proclaimed
subtitle: Declaration of independence
fact: The Act of Independence of Lithuania or the Act of February 16th, also the Lithuanian Resolution on Independence, was signed by the Council of Lithuania on February 16, 1918, proclaiming independence from Russia and the restoration of an independent State of Lithuania, governed by democratic principles, with Vilnius as its capital.

title: Former Qin begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: Qin, known as the Former Qin and Fu Qin (苻秦) in historiography, was a dynastic state of China ruled by the Fu (Pu) clan of the Di peoples during the Sixteen Kingdoms period.

title: Egyptian Ikhshidid Emirate begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Ikhshidid dynasty was a Turkic dynasty of governors of Mamluk origin, who governed Egypt and parts of the Levant from 935 to 969 on behalf of the Abbasid Caliphate.

title: Bahri dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Bahri Mamluks, sometimes referred to as the Bahri dynasty, were the rulers of the Mamluk Sultanate of Egypt from 1250 to 1382, following the Ayyubid dynasty.

title: Austrian colonies is established
subtitle: Colonial empire
fact: From the 17th century through to the 19th century, the Habsburg monarchy, Austrian Empire, and the Austro-Hungarian Empire made a few small short-lived attempts to expand overseas colonial trade through the acquisition of factories.

title: Sixteenth Dynasty of Egypt begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Sixteenth Dynasty of ancient Egypt was a dynasty of pharaohs that ruled the Theban region in Upper Egypt for 70 years.

title: Western Wei begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: Wei, known in historiography as the Western Wei, was an imperial dynasty of China that followed the disintegration of the Northern Wei.

title: Swedish Livonia is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: Swedish Livonia was a dominion of the Swedish Empire from 1629 until 1721.

title: Venezuela Declaration of Independence is proclaimed
subtitle: Declaration of independence
fact: The Venezuelan Declaration of Independence is a document drafted and adopted by Venezuela on July 5, 1811, through which Venezuelans made the decision to separate from the Spanish Crown in order to establish a new nation based on the premises of equality of individuals, abolition of censorship and dedication to freedom of expression.

title: French Togoland is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: French Togoland was a French colonial League of Nations mandate from 1916 to 1946, and a UN trust territory from 1946 to 1960 in French West Africa.

title: Eldiguzids begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Ildegizids, Eldiguzids or Ildenizids, also known as Atabegs of Azerbaijan, were an Atabegate that broke off from the Seljuk Empire, and a Sunni Muslim Turkic dynasty, which controlled most of northwestern Persia, eastern Transcaucasia, including Arran, most of Iranian Azerbaijan, and Jibal.

title: Danishmendid dynasty is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Danishmendids or Danishmends were a Turkish dynasty.

title: Genghisid begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Chinggisids were the descendants of Genghis Khan, also known as Chinggis Khan, and his first wife Börte.

title: Hammadid dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Hammadid dynasty, also known as the Hammadid Emirate or the Kingdom of Bejaia, was a medieval Islamic kingdom in the central Maghreb, encompassing what is now Algeria.

title: Kakuyids begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Kakuyids were a Shia Muslim dynasty of Daylamite origin that held power in western Persia, Jibal and Kurdistan.

title: Gambia Colony and Protectorate is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: The Gambia Colony and Protectorate was the British colonial administration of The Gambia from 1821 to 1965, part of the British Empire in the New Imperialism era.

title: Qutb Shahi dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Sultanate of Golconda was an early modern kingdom in southern India, ruled by the Persianate, Shia Islamic Qutb Shahi dynasty of Turkoman origin.

title: House of Nassau-Weilburg begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The House of Nassau-Weilburg, a branch of the House of Nassau, ruled a division of the County of Nassau, which was a state in what is now Germany, then part of the Holy Roman Empire, from 1344 to 1806.

title: Crimean People's Republic is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Crimean People's Republic or Crimean Democratic Republic was a self-declared state that existed from December 1917 to January 1918 in the Crimean Peninsula.

title: Twenty-ninth Dynasty of Egypt begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Twenty-ninth Dynasty of Egypt is usually classified as the fourth Dynasty of the Ancient Egyptian Late Period.

title: Swedish Gold Coast is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: The Swedish Gold Coast was a Swedish colony founded in 1650 by the Swedish Africa Company and Hendrik Carloff on the Gulf of Guinea in present-day Ghana in Africa.

title: Đinh Dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Đinh dynasty, officially Đại Cồ Việt, was a Vietnamese dynasty.

title: Spanish West Africa is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: Spanish West Africa was a grouping of Spanish colonies along the Atlantic coast of northwest Africa.

title: Uqaylid dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The ʿUqaylid dynasty, also known as the ʿUqaylid Emirate or ʿUqaylid Realm, was a Shīa Arab realm with several lines that controlled much of Iraq, Levant, Jazira and southern Anatolia; it also controlled northwestern Iran and northern Arabia in the late tenth and eleventh centuries.

title: Awan dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Awan dynasty was the first dynasty of Elam of which very little of anything is known today—appearing at the dawn of recorded history.

title: Sallarid dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Sallarid dynasty, was a Shia Muslim dynasty of Daylami origin, which ruled in Tarom, Samiran, Daylam, Gilan and subsequently Azerbaijan, Arran, and some districts in Eastern Armenia in the 2nd half of the 10th century.

title: Mamluk rule in Iraq begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Mamluk dynasty of Iraq was a dynasty of Georgian Mamluk origin which ruled over Iraq in the 18th and early 19th centuries.

title: Brandenburger Gold Coast is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: The Brandenburger Gold Coast, later Prussian Gold Coast, was a colony of Brandenburg-Prussia, later the Kingdom of Prussia, on the Gold Coast.

title: Albanian Declaration of Independence is proclaimed
subtitle: Declaration of independence
fact: The Albanian Declaration of Independence was the declaration of independence of Albania from the Ottoman Empire.

title: Twenty-third Dynasty of Egypt begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Twenty-third Dynasty was an Ancient Egyptian dynasty of ancient Libyan origin which is usually classified as the third dynasty of the ancient Egyptian Third Intermediate Period in modern periodization.

title: Estonian Declaration of Independence is proclaimed
subtitle: Declaration of independence
fact: The Estonian Declaration of Independence, also known as the Manifesto to the Peoples of Estonia, is the founding act which established the independent democratic Republic of Estonia on 24 February 1918.

title: Twenty-fourth Dynasty of Egypt begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Twenty-fourth Dynasty of Egypt is usually classified as the fourth Dynasty of the Ancient Egyptian Third Intermediate Period.

title: Attalid dynasty begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Kingdom of Pergamon, Pergamene Kingdom, or Attalid kingdom was a Greek state during the Hellenistic period that ruled much of the Western part of Asia Minor from its capital city of Pergamon.

title: Tenth Dynasty of Egypt begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Tenth Dynasty of ancient Egypt is often combined with the 7th, 8th, 9th and early 11th Dynasties under the group title First Intermediate Period.

title: Ninth Dynasty of Egypt begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Ninth Dynasty of ancient Egypt is often combined with the 7th, 8th, 10th and early 11th Dynasties under the group title First Intermediate Period.

title: Marwanids begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Marwanid dynasty, also known as the Dustakids, were a Kurdish Sunni Muslim dynasty in the Diyar Bakr region of Upper Mesopotamia, centered on the city of Mayyafariqin.

title: Almohads begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Almohad Caliphate or Almohad Empire was a North African empire ruled by a Berber Muslim dynasty in the 12th and 13th centuries.

title: Catalan Republic is established
subtitle: Historical state
fact: The Catalan declaration of independence was a resolution that was passed by the Parliament of Catalonia on 27 October 2017.

title: Kartids begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Kart dynasty, also known as the Kartids, was a Sunni Muslim dynasty of Tajik origin, closely related to the Ghurids, that ruled over a large part of Khorasan during the 13th and 14th centuries.

title: Malayan Declaration of Independence is proclaimed
subtitle: Declaration of independence
fact: The Malayan Declaration of Independence, was officially proclaimed on Saturday, 31 August 1957, by Tunku Abdul Rahman, the first chief minister of the Federation of Malaya.

title: Western Han begins
subtitle: Dynasty
fact: The Han dynasty was an imperial dynasty of China established by Liu Bang, preceded by the Qin dynasty (221–206 BC) and a warring interregnum known as the Chu–Han Contention (206–202 BC), and succeeded by the Three Kingdoms period (220–280 AD).

title: Czechoslovak declaration of independence is proclaimed
subtitle: Declaration of independence
fact: The Czechoslovak Declaration of Independence or the Washington Declaration was drafted in Washington, D.C., and published by Czechoslovakia's Paris-based Provisional Government on 18 October 1918.

title: Proclamation of Korean Independence is proclaimed
subtitle: Declaration of independence
fact: The Korean Declaration of Independence is the statement adopted by the 33 Korean representatives meeting at Taehwagwan, the restaurant located in what is now Insa-dong, Jongno District, Seoul on March 1, 1919, four months after the end of World War I, which announced that Korea would no longer tolerate Japanese rule.

title: Senegambia and Niger is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: Senegambia and Niger was a short-lived administrative unit of the colonial French West Africa possessions, in the region of present-day Niger, Mali and Senegal.

title: Upper Senegal and Niger is established
subtitle: Colony
fact: Upper Senegal and Niger was a colony in French West Africa, created on 21 October 1904 from colonial Senegambia and Niger by the decree "For the Reorganisation of the general government of French West Africa".
